title: Chamumda Chalisa
intro: Shri Chamunda Chalisa: Full Path, Meaning, and Benefits - Hymn to Goddess Chamunda
description:
॥ Doha ॥
  Nilvarna Maa Kalika rehti sada prachand.
  Das hathon mein shastra dhar deti dusht ko dand.
  Madhu-Kaitabh sanhar kar, kari dharm ki jeet.
  Meri bhi peeda haro, ho jo karm puneet.
  
  ॥ Chaupai ॥
  Namaskar Chamunda Mata.
  Teeno lok mein vikhyata.
  Himalaya mein pavitra dham hai.
  Mahashakti tumko pranam hai.
  Markandeya Rishi ne dhyaya.
  Kaise pragati bhed bataya.
  Shumbha-Nishumbha do daitya balshali.
  Teeno lok jo kar diye khali.
  Vayu, Agni yaan Kubera sang.
  Surya, Chandra, Varun huye tang.
  Apmanit charno mein aaye.
  Giriraj Himalaya ko laye.
  Bhadra-Raudra nitya dhyaya.
  Chetan shakti karke bulaya.
  Krodhit hokar Kali aayi.
  Jisne apni leela dikhayi.
  Chanda-Munda aur Shumbha padhare.
  Kamuk bairi ladne aaye.
  Pehle Sugriva doot ko maara.
  Bhaga Chanda bhi mara-maara.
  Arbo sainik lekar aaya.
  Teeno lokon mein krodh dikhaya.
  Jaise hi dusht lalkara.
  Hunkar shabd gunja ke maara.
  Sena ne machayi bhagdad.
  Fada singh ne aaya jo baad.
  Hatya karne Chanda-Munda aaye.
  Madira peekar ke ghurraye.
  Chaturangi sena sang laye.
  Unche-unche shivir giraye.
  Tumne krodhit roop nikala.
  Pragati daal gale mund mala.
  Charm ki sadi cheete wali.
  Haddi dhancha tha balshali.
  Vikral mukhi aankhein dikhlai.
  Jise dekh srishti ghabrai.
  Chanda-Munda ne chakra chalaya.
  Le talwar hunkar gunjaya.
  Papiyon ka kar diya nistara.
  Chanda-Munda dono ko maara.
  Haath mein mastak le muskayi.
  Papi sena phir ghabrayi.
  Saraswati Maa tumhein pukara.
  Pada Chamunda naam tihara.
  Chanda-Munda ki mrityu sunkar.
  Kalak Maurya aaye raat par.
  Arab-kharab yuddh ke path par.
  Jhok diye sab Chamunda par.
  Ugra Chandika pragati aakar.
  Geedadiyon ki wadi bharkar.
  Kali khatvang ghuson se maara.
  Brahmand ne phenki jal dhara.
  Maheshwari ne trishul chalaya.
  Maa Vaishnavi chakra ghumaya.
  Kartikeya ki shakti aayi.
  Narsinghi daityon pe chhayi.
  Chun-chun singh sabhi ko khaya.
  Har danav ghayal ghabraya.
  Rakt-beej maya phailayi.
  Shakti usne nayi dikhayi.
  Rakt gira jab dharti upar.
  Naya daitya pragata tha wahin par.
  Chandi Maa ab shool ghumaya.
  Mara usko lahoo chusaya.
  Shumbha-Nishumbha ab daude aaye.
  Satatar sena bharkar laye.
  Vajrapat sang shool chalaya.
  Sabhi devta kuch ghabraye.
  Lalkara phir ghusa maara.
  Le trishul kiya nistara.
  Shumbha-Nishumbha dharti par soye.
  Daitya sabhi dekhkar roye.
  Chamunda Maa dhrum bachaya.
  Apna shubh mandir banwaya.
  Sabhi devta aake maante.
  Hanumat-Bhairav chanwar dulate.
  Ashwin, Chaitra Navratri aao.
  Dhwaja, nariyal bhent chadhao.
  Vandar nadi sannan karau.
  Chamunda Maa tumko piyau.
  
  ॥ Doha ॥
  Sharanagat ko shakti do, he jag ki aadhar.
  'Om' ye naiya dolti, kar do bhav se paar.
meaning:
॥ Doha ॥
  Nilvarna Maa Kalika rehti sada prachand.
  Mother Kalika, of dark complexion, always remains fierce.

  Das hathon mein shastra dhar deti dusht ko dand.
  Holding weapons in ten hands, she punishes the wicked.

  Madhu-Kaitabh sanhar kar, kari dharm ki jeet.
  Destroying Madhu and Kaitabh, she ensured the victory of Dharma.

  Meri bhi peeda haro, ho jo karm puneet.
  Remove my pain too, so that my deeds become pure.

  ॥ Chaupai ॥
  Namaskar Chamunda Mata.
  Salutations to Mother Chamunda.

  Teeno lok mein vikhyata.
  Renowned in all three worlds.

  Himalaya mein pavitra dham hai.
  Your holy abode is in the Himalayas.

  Mahashakti tumko pranam hai.
  O Great Power, I bow to you.

  Markandeya Rishi ne dhyaya.
  Sage Markandeya meditated upon you.

  Kaise pragati bhed bataya.
  He revealed the secret of how you appeared.

  Shumbha-Nishumbha do daitya balshali.
  Shumbha and Nishumbha, two powerful demons.

  Teeno lok jo kar diye khali.
  Who emptied all three worlds.

  Vayu, Agni yaan Kubera sang.
  Along with Vayu, Agni, and Kubera.

  Surya, Chandra, Varun huye tang.
  Surya, Chandra, and Varuna were troubled.

  Apmanit charno mein aaye.
  Insulted, they came to your feet.

  Giriraj Himalaya ko laye.
  They brought the King of Mountains, the Himalayas.

  Bhadra-Raudra nitya dhyaya.
  They constantly meditated on Bhadra-Raudra.

  Chetan shakti karke bulaya.
  They summoned the conscious power.

  Krodhit hokar Kali aayi.
  Kali came, filled with rage.

  Jisne apni leela dikhayi.
  She displayed her divine play.

  Chanda-Munda aur Shumbha padhare.
  Chanda, Munda, and Shumbha arrived.

  Kamuk bairi ladne aaye.
  The lustful enemies came to fight.

  Pehle Sugriva doot ko maara.
  First, she killed the messenger Sugriva.

  Bhaga Chanda bhi mara-maara.
  The fleeing Chanda was also struck down.

  Arbo sainik lekar aaya.
  He brought billions of soldiers.

  Teeno lokon mein krodh dikhaya.
  Showed anger in all three worlds.

  Jaise hi dusht lalkara.
  As soon as the wicked one challenged.

  Hunkar shabd gunja ke maara.
  She killed him with a thundering roar.

  Sena ne machayi bhagdad.
  The army created a stampede.

  Fada singh ne aaya jo baad.
  The lion tore apart whoever came later.

  Hatya karne Chanda-Munda aaye.
  Chanda and Munda came to commit murder.

  Madira peekar ke ghurraye.
  They roared after drinking wine.

  Chaturangi sena sang laye.
  They brought an army of four divisions.

  Unche-unche shivir giraye.
  They collapsed the high camps.

  Tumne krodhit roop nikala.
  You took on a fierce form.

  Pragati daal gale mund mala.
  Appeared with a garland of skulls around your neck.

  Charm ki sadi cheete wali.
  Dressed in a leopard skin saree.

  Haddi dhancha tha balshali.
  A powerful skeletal frame.

  Vikral mukhi aankhein dikhlai.
  Showed a terrifying face and eyes.

  Jise dekh srishti ghabrai.
  Seeing which, the universe trembled.

  Chanda-Munda ne chakra chalaya.
  Chanda and Munda threw their weapons.

  Le talwar hunkar gunjaya.
  She roared while holding the sword.

  Papiyon ka kar diya nistara.
  She delivered the sinners from their sins.

  Chanda-Munda dono ko maara.
  She killed both Chanda and Munda.

  Haath mein mastak le muskayi.
  She smiled holding their heads in her hand.

  Papi sena phir ghabrayi.
  The sinful army got frightened again.

  Saraswati Maa tumhein pukara.
  Mother Saraswati called out to you.

  Pada Chamunda naam tihara.
  And thus you were named Chamunda.

  Chanda-Munda ki mrityu sunkar.
  Hearing of Chanda and Munda's death.

  Kalak Maurya aaye raat par.
  Kalak and Maurya arrived at night.

  Arab-kharab yuddh ke path par.
  On the path of billions of wars.

  Jhok diye sab Chamunda par.
  They unleashed everything upon Chamunda.

  Ugra Chandika pragati aakar.
  The fierce Chandika appeared.

  Geedadiyon ki wadi bharkar.
  Surrounded by a pack of jackals.

  Kali khatvang ghuson se maara.
  Kali struck them with her club and fists.

  Brahmand ne phenki jal dhara.
  The universe threw a stream of water.

  Maheshwari ne trishul chalaya.
  Maheshwari wielded the trident.

  Maa Vaishnavi chakra ghumaya.
  Mother Vaishnavi spun the discus.

  Kartikeya ki shakti aayi.
  Kartikeya's power arrived.

  Narsinghi daityon pe chhayi.
  Narsinghi dominated the demons.

  Chun-chun singh sabhi ko khaya.
  The lion picked and ate them all.

  Har danav ghayal ghabraya.
  Every demon was wounded and terrified.

  Rakt-beej maya phailayi.
  Rakt-beej spread his illusion.

  Shakti usne nayi dikhayi.
  He showed a new power.

  Rakt gira jab dharti upar.
  When blood fell upon the earth.

  Naya daitya pragata tha wahin par.
  A new demon appeared right there.

  Chandi Maa ab shool ghumaya.
  Mother Chandi then spun the lance.

  Mara usko lahoo chusaya.
  Killed him and drank his blood.

  Shumbha-Nishumbha ab daude aaye.
  Shumbha and Nishumbha now came running.

  Satatar sena bharkar laye.
  Brought an army of many soldiers.

  Vajrapat sang shool chalaya.
  Fired a spear like a thunderbolt.

  Sabhi devta kuch ghabraye.
  All gods were a bit frightened.

  Lalkara phir ghusa maara.
  She challenged and struck a blow.

  Le trishul kiya nistara.
  She delivered them using the trident.

  Shumbha-Nishumbha dharti par soye.
  Shumbha and Nishumbha slept on the earth.

  Daitya sabhi dekhkar roye.
  All the demons saw this and wept.

  Chamunda Maa dhrum bachaya.
  Mother Chamunda saved the world.

  Apna shubh mandir banwaya.
  And built her auspicious temple.

  Sabhi devta aake maante.
  All gods come and pay homage.

  Hanumat-Bhairav chanwar dulate.
  Hanumat and Bhairav wave the chanwar.

  Ashwin, Chaitra Navratri aao.
  Come during Ashwin and Chaitra Navratri.

  Dhwaja, nariyal bhent chadhao.
  Offer flags and coconuts.

  Vandar nadi sannan karau.
  Bathe in the Vandar river.

  Chamunda Maa tumko piyau.
  Mother Chamunda, I pray to you.

  ॥ Doha ॥
  Sharanagat ko shakti do, he jag ki aadhar.
  Give strength to those who seek refuge, O foundation of the world.

  'Om' ye naiya dolti, kar do bhav se paar.
  This 'Om' boat is swaying, take it across the ocean of existence.

faq.q1: Why is the Chamunda Chalisa recited?
faq.a1: Maa Chamunda is considered a fierce and powerful form of Goddess Durga. This Chalisa is primarily recited to dispel negative energy, gain victory over enemies, and destroy obstacles in life.
faq.q2: What is the most auspicious day to read the Chamunda Chalisa?
faq.a2: Tuesdays and Saturdays are considered extremely auspicious for the worship of Maa Chamunda. Reciting it during Navratri is especially rewarding.
faq.q3: Does reading the Chamunda Chalisa create fear in the mind?
faq.a3: Absolutely not. Maa Chamunda is the protector of her devotees. Reciting her Chalisa removes unknown fears, anxieties, and negativity from the mind.
faq.q4: Can anyone recite the Chamunda Chalisa?
faq.a4: Yes, anyone who holds faith and a pure heart toward the Goddess can recite this Chalisa with full dedication.
faq.q5: Are there any specific rituals required while reading it?
faq.a5: There is no need for any complex Tantra or rituals for Maa Chamunda. Reciting it with a calm mind, cleanliness, and complete surrender is sufficient.
